info.title: User Account Service API
info.description:
Manages user accounts, invitations, server profiles, and authentication
for the LegalDispatch platform.

## Authentication
Most endpoints require a JWT token passed via the API Gateway. The gateway
validates the token and forwards claims in the `X-User-Claims` header.

## Error Responses
All errors follow a consistent JSON envelope:
```json
{ "code": "ERROR_CODE", "message": "Human-readable message", "request_id": "..." }
```

## Naming Convention
All JSON fields use **snake_case** naming.

post.description: Completes an invitation-based registration by creating the user account, credentials in the Auth Service, and an email verification token. The invitation token is consumed and cannot be reused.
Self-registration for independent process servers. No invitation required. Creates a user account with `role = process_server`, an empty server profile, and sends an email verification link.
Verifies a user's email using the one-time token sent to their inbox. Transitions the user status from `pending_verification` to `active`.

Invites a new operations staff member to the caller's partner organization. Validates the role, checks seat limits, and ensures no duplicate pending invitation exists. For `client_user` role, a valid `client_id` must be provided.

get.description: Returns all invitations for the caller's partner, optionally filtered by `status` (`pending`, `accepted`, `expired`, `revoked`). Includes the inviter's display name for each invitation.

post.description: Invites an independent process server to join the caller's partner network. Checks for existing active relationships and duplicate pending invitations.

delete.description: Revokes a pending invitation, preventing the recipient from registering. Only pending invitations belonging to the caller's partner can be revoked.

post.description: Resends the invitation email for a pending invitation. Expired or already-accepted invitations cannot be resent.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all users belonging to the caller's partner organization. Supports optional filtering by `role`, `status`, and free-text `search` (matches name or email). Default page size is 20; maximum is 100.
Returns the full profile of a specific user within the caller's partner organization. Returns 404 if the user does not exist or belongs to a different partner.

put.description: Changes the role of a user within the caller's partner organization. **Required Role:** `partner_admin` only. Guards: cannot change your own role; cannot remove the last `partner_admin`.

post.description: Deactivates a user account (soft delete). The user loses access immediately and all active sessions are invalidated. Data and order history are retained for audit. **Required Role:** `partner_admin` only.
Reactivates a previously deactivated or suspended user account. Checks that reactivation would not exceed the partner's seat limit. **Required Role:** `partner_admin` only.

get.description: Returns the full profile of the currently authenticated user, including partner name, notification preferences, and account status. Any authenticated user can call this endpoint.

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile. Only provided (non-null) fields are changed. Updatable fields: `first_name`, `last_name`, `phone`, and `notification_preferences`. Email and role cannot be changed through this endpoint.

post.description: Upload a new avatar image for the current user. **Content-Type:** `multipart/form-data` with a `file` field. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Maximum size: 5 MB.

Changes the authenticated user's password. Requires current password confirmation. The password change is delegated to the Auth Service, which verifies the current password before applying the update.

get.description: Returns the authenticated process server's public marketplace profile, including certifications, service areas, work preferences, and aggregate stats. Only accessible to users with the `process_server` role.

put.description: Updates the authenticated process server's marketplace profile. Only provided (non-null) fields are applied. Updatable fields: `display_name`, `bio`, `base_rate`, `availability_status`, and `work_preferences`.

Replaces all service coverage areas for the authenticated process server. Existing areas are deactivated and new areas are inserted atomically in a single transaction. Supported area types: `state`, `county`, `city`, `zip`, `radius`.

get.description: Returns all partner relationships for the authenticated process server, including pending invitations, active partnerships, and terminated relationships. Partner names are resolved from the Partner Management Service.

post.description: Accepts a pending partner relationship invitation. Sets the agreed rate and activates the relationship, enabling the server to receive assignments from this partner. The relationship must be in `pending` status.
Declines a pending partner relationship invitation. Sets the relationship status to `declined`. The relationship must be in `pending` status.

agreed_rate.description: Agreed-upon rate in USD per serve for this relationship.

coverage_areas_for_partner.description: Coverage areas the server will cover for this partner.

avatar_url.description: CDN URL for the newly uploaded avatar image.

state.description: Two-letter US state code where the certification was issued.

number.description: Certification or license number assigned by the issuing authority.

expires_at.description: Expiration date; null if the certification does not expire.

CertificationDto.description: Certification entry within a server profile response.

ChangePasswordRequest.description:
Request body for `POST /api/v1/users/me/change-password`.
Both current and new passwords are required.

role.description: New role to assign — must be a valid operations role constant.

reason.description: Reason for the role change (stored in the audit trail).

ChangeRoleRequest.description:
Request body for `PUT /api/v1/users/:id/role`.
Changes a user's role within the caller's partner scope.

previous_role.description: The user's previous role before the change.

new_role.description: The user's new role after the change.

changed_by.description: ID of the admin who performed the change.

changed_at.description: UTC timestamp when the role was changed.

partner_id.description: Partner context for the permission check.

allowed.description: Whether the user holds the requested permission.

role.description: User role used for the permission resolution.

first_name.description: Optional pre-filled first name for the invitee.

last_name.description: Optional pre-filled last name for the invitee.

message.description: Optional personal message included in the invitation email.

client_id.description:
Client ID to scope the invited user to a specific client organization.
Required when string CreateInvitationRequest.Role is `client_user`.

CreateInvitationRequest.description:
Request body for `POST /api/v1/invitations`.
Invites an operations staff member to join the caller's partner.

message.description: Optional personal message included in the invitation email.

proposed_base_rate.description: Proposed pay rate in USD per serve.

proposed_coverage_areas.description: Proposed service coverage areas (e.g., county names).

CreateServerInvitationRequest.description:
Request body for `POST /api/v1/invitations/server`.
Invites a process server to join the caller's partner network.

reason.description: Reason for deactivation (stored in the audit trail).

reassign_open_orders_to.description: Optional user ID to reassign open orders to.

deactivated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the deactivation occurred.

partner_name.description: Partner display name (enriched from cache or PMS).

InternalAccountSummary.description: Minimal account summary for the multi-account partner selector during login.

email.description: Login email address — used as the JWT `email` claim.

first_name.description: User's given name — used in the JWT `name` claim and UI display.

last_name.description: User's family name — used in the JWT `name` claim and UI display.

partner_id.description: Partner scope; null for process servers.

partner_name.description: Human-readable partner display name; null when Guid? InternalAuthContextResponse.PartnerId is null.

client_id.description: Client organization ID; present only for `client_user` role.

permissions.description:
Permission set for operations users / super admins.
Null for process servers (they use IReadOnlyList<InternalPartnerRelationshipSummary>? InternalAuthContextResponse.PartnerRelationships instead).

partner_relationships.description:
Active partner relationships for process servers.
Null for operations users (they use IReadOnlyList<string>? InternalAuthContextResponse.Permissions instead).

InternalAuthContextResponse.description:
Full auth context for JWT construction — contains role, partner, status, and either
permissions (operations users) or partner relationships (process servers).
Includes string InternalAuthContextResponse.Email, string InternalAuthContextResponse.FirstName, string InternalAuthContextResponse.LastName, and
string? InternalAuthContextResponse.PartnerName so callers can build JWT claims in a single round-trip.

agreed_rate.description: Agreed rate in USD per serve for this relationship.

InternalAvailableServer.description: Available server entry in the assignment view response.

servers.description: List of available servers sorted by coverage specificity, rating, then distance.

InternalAvailableServersResponse.description: Wrapper for the available servers list response.

active.description: Whether the certification is currently active and not expired.

InternalCertificationSummary.description: Certification summary for internal server profile response.

phone.description: Phone number (E.164 format); null if not set.

InternalContactResponse.description: User contact information for outbound notifications.

InternalEmailResolutionResponse.description: Multi-account resolution response — wraps either a single account or a partner-selector list.

email.description: Whether the user receives email notifications.

sms.description: Whether the user receives SMS notifications.

push.description: Whether the user receives push notifications.

InternalPartnerRelationshipSummary.description: Partner relationship summary included in the auth context for process servers.

total_seats_in_use.description: Sum of active users and pending invitations.

InternalPartnerUserCountResponse.description: Partner user counts for seat limit enforcement.

InternalServerProfileResponse.description:
Server profile response including location data for assignment/distance calculations.
Internal-only: includes `home_base_lat` / `home_base_lng` which are never exposed publicly.

radius_miles.description: Radius in miles (only for `radius` area type).

center_zip.description: Center ZIP code (only for `radius` area type).

InternalServiceAreaSummary.description: Service area summary for internal server profile response.

partner_id.description: Partner scope; null for globally-scoped roles.

email_verified.description: Whether the user's email has been verified.

InternalUserByEmailResponse.description: Login-resolution response for a single email + partner lookup.

partner_id.description: Partner this user belongs to; null for process servers and super admins.

InternalUserResponse.description:
Lightweight user identity response returned by `GET /internal/user/:id`.
Used by downstream services to resolve user names, roles, and partner scope.

InternalUserStatusResponse.description:
Minimal status-check response for `GET /internal/user/:id/status`.
Used by the API Gateway to gate request forwarding.

role.description: Role to assign upon acceptance; null for server invitations.

invited_by_name.description: Display name of the user who created the invitation.

InvitationListItem.description: An invitation list item with inviter name for display.

data.description: List of invitations for the current page.

role.description: Role to assign upon acceptance; null for server invitations.

expires_at.description: UTC expiration timestamp for the invitation link.

phone.description: Optional phone number in E.164 format.

avatar_url.description: CDN URL for the user's avatar image.

partner_id.description: Partner organization ID; null for globally-scoped roles.

partner_name.description: Partner display name resolved from the Partner Management Service.

email_verified.description: Whether the user has verified their email address.

last_login_at.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent successful login.

MyProfileResponse.description:
Current user's profile response for `GET /api/v1/users/me`.
Includes partner name and nested notification preferences.

email.description: Whether the user receives email notifications.

sms.description: Whether the user receives SMS notifications.

push.description: Whether the user receives push notifications.

NotificationPreferences.description: Nested notification channel preferences for the profile response.

total.description: Total matching records across all pages.

relationships.description: All partner relationships for this server.

PartnerRelationshipsResponse.description:
Response from `GET /api/v1/users/me/partner-relationships`.
Lists all partner relationships for the authenticated process server.

send_invitation.description: Whether to email the invitation (default: true).

reactivated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the reactivation occurred.

logged_in_at.description:
Login timestamp in UTC. Optional — the service layer defaults to DateTime DateTime.UtcNow
when the caller omits this field (i.e., it deserializes as `default(DateTime)`).

invitation_token.description: Cryptographic token from the invitation email link.

password.description: Plain-text password (hashed by the Auth Service).

agreed_to_terms.description: Must be `true` to proceed with registration.

RegisterRequest.description:
Request body for `POST /api/v1/accounts/register`.
Completes an invitation-based registration by creating the user account.

partner_id.description: Partner the user was invited to join.

client_id.description: Client ID if the user is a `client_user`; null otherwise.

email_verified.description: Whether the user's email has been verified.

email.description: Globally unique email for the server account.

password.description: Plain-text password (hashed by the Auth Service).

state.description: Two-letter US state code for the server's primary operating state.

agreed_to_terms.description: Must be `true` to proceed with registration.

RegisterServerRequest.description:
Request body for `POST /api/v1/accounts/register/server`.
Self-registration for independent process servers (no invitation required).

next_step.description: Hint for the client to prompt email verification.

activated_at.description: When the relationship was activated (present on acceptance).

agreed_rate.description: Agreed pay rate in USD per serve (null for pending relationships).

coverage_areas.description: Coverage areas negotiated for this partner.

total_orders.description: Total orders completed through this relationship.

invitation_sent_at.description: When the invitation was sent (for pending relationships).

proposed_rate.description: Proposed rate from the inviting partner (for pending relationships).

resent_at.description: UTC timestamp when the email was resent.

display_name.description: Public display name shown in marketplace listings.

certifications.description: Active professional certifications held by this server.

service_areas.description: Geographic coverage areas where the server accepts work.

base_rate.description: Default standard service rate in USD per serve.

work_preferences.description: Work type preferences (rush, same-day, weekend, case types).

average_rating.description: Aggregate rating across all partner relationships (0.0–5.0 scale).

total_orders_completed.description: Total number of orders completed across all partners.

member_since.description: Date the server joined the platform.

response_time_avg_minutes.description: Average response time to new assignments in minutes.

ServerProfileResponse.description:
Full process server marketplace profile returned by `GET /api/v1/users/me/server-profile`.
Includes certifications, service areas, work preferences, and aggregate stats.

value.description: Value identifying the area (e.g., county name, city name, ZIP code).

state.description: Two-letter US state code for disambiguation.

radius_miles.description: Radius in miles (only for `radius` area type).

center_zip.description: Center ZIP code (only for `radius` area type).

ServiceAreaDto.description: Geographic service area entry within a server profile response.

value.description: Value identifying the area (e.g., county name, city name, ZIP code).

state.description: Two-letter US state code for disambiguation.

radius_miles.description: Radius in miles (required for `radius` area type).

center_zip.description: Center ZIP code (required for `radius` area type).

ServiceAreaInput.description: Input model for a single service area in the update request.

password_changed.description: Whether the password was successfully changed.

sessions_invalidated.description: Whether existing sessions were invalidated after the password change.

first_name.description: Updated first name; null to leave unchanged.

last_name.description: Updated last name; null to leave unchanged.

phone.description: Updated phone number; null to leave unchanged.

oneOf.description: Updated notification preferences; null to leave unchanged.

UpdateProfileRequest.description:
Request body for `PUT /api/v1/users/me`.
Only provided (non-null) fields are applied to the profile.

display_name.description: Updated public display name; null to leave unchanged.

bio.description: Updated free-text biography; null to leave unchanged.

base_rate.description: Updated base rate in USD; null to leave unchanged.

availability_status.description: Updated availability status; null to leave unchanged.

oneOf.description: Updated work preferences; null to leave unchanged.

UpdateServerProfileRequest.description:
Request body for `PUT /api/v1/users/me/server-profile`.
Only provided (non-null) fields are applied.

service_areas.description: Complete set of service areas to replace the current ones.

UpdateServiceAreasRequest.description:
Request body for `PUT /api/v1/users/me/server-profile/service-areas`.
Replaces all existing service areas atomically.

service_areas.description: Updated list of active service areas.

phone.description: Optional phone number in E.164 format.

avatar_url.description: CDN URL for the user's avatar image.

email_verified.description: Whether the user has verified their email address.

client_id.description: Client organization ID; null unless role is `client_user`.

deactivated_at.description: UTC timestamp when the account was deactivated; null if active.

deactivated_reason.description: Free-text reason recorded at deactivation time.

last_login_at.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent successful login.

notification_email.description: Whether the user receives email notifications.

notification_sms.description: Whether the user receives SMS notifications.

notification_push.description: Whether the user receives push notifications.

UserDetailResponse.description: Detailed user profile response returned by `GET /api/v1/users/:id`.

client_id.description: Client organization ID; null unless role is `client_user`.

last_login_at.description: UTC timestamp of the most recent successful login.

UserListItem.description:
Summary projection of a user for list responses.
Contains the most commonly needed fields for admin dashboards.

data.description: List of user summaries for the current page.

token.description: Email verification token from the verification email.

user_id.description: ID of the user whose email was verified.

accepts_rush.description: Whether the server accepts rush (expedited) service requests.

accepts_same_day.description: Whether the server accepts same-day service requests.

accepts_weekend.description: Whether the server accepts weekend service requests.

WorkPreferencesDto.description: Work preferences nested in the server profile response.

tags.name: Registration
tags.description: User account creation and email verification.

tags.name: Invitations
tags.description: Invite operations staff or process servers to join a partner.

tags.name: Users
tags.description: User profile management, role changes, and deactivation.

tags.name: Server Profiles
tags.description: Public marketplace profiles for process servers.
